stats.fact: 67% of banks apply AI for fraud detection; 63% use it for anti-money laundering (AML) activities
Modern AI transaction monitoring systems achieve 95%+ precision and reduce false positives by up to 80%
92% of financial firms are investing in AI and machine learning for fraud and risk management
69% of firms warn that accelerating AI adoption will lead to compliance issues within the next 12 months

Over 40% of AI patents focus on fraud detection and risk management applications
Experian's AI-powered Transaction Forensics uses over 80 AI models for fraud risk analysis across bank-to-bank payments
